case_title: LVNV FUNDING, LLC VS. GERMAN SALAZAR

docket_entries.description: COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $128.40 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS, (TRANSACTION ID # 59798067) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING, LLC AS ASSIGNEE OF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES, LLC
